title: github.com/iwc-workflows/velocyto/Velocyto-on10X-filtered-barcodes
author: Lucille Lopez-Delisle
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Processes 10X Genomics single-cell RNA-seq data using Velocyto to quantify spliced and unspliced transcript counts for RNA velocity analysis. Takes pre-filtered cell barcodes as input and generates a loom file containing separate counts for spliced exons, unspliced introns, and ambiguous regions. Enables downstream trajectory inference and cellular dynamics analysis in tools like scVelo.
steps_raw: Processes 10X Genomics single-cell RNA-seq data using Velocyto to quantify spliced and unspliced transcript counts for RNA velocity analysis. Takes pre-filtered cell barcodes as input and generates a loom file containing separate counts for spliced exons, unspliced introns, and ambiguous regions. Enables downstream trajectory inference and cellular dynamics analysis in tools like scVelo.
